name: io.github.sebastienrousseau/inclusio-mcp
description: MCP server for the Inclusio accessibility-first LaTeX publishing engine. Exposes tools for tagged-PDF generation (PDF/UA-2 + WTPDF + PDF/A-4f triple-conformance), multi-format emission (HTML5 / JATS / EPUB3), C2PA + PAdES + SLSA provenance, and LLM-augmented accessibility judges. Requires the [mcp] install extra: `pip install 'inclusio[mcp]'`.
